# Ethan Flow — Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Ethan Flow, Software Engineer, Jesus Follower, Nature Lover, and Founder of Jedidiah Digital.

## About

Ethan Flow is a software engineer based in Oregon with a B.S. in Computer Science from Oregon State University (Jun 2025). He started in healthcare, switched to computer science, and never looked back. His faith, his wife, and his family keep him grounded. He is the founder of Jedidiah Digital.

## Skills

- Backend: Go, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Docker, AWS, Stripe
- Frontend: React, Next.js, Solid.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, Tailwind
- Systems & Networking: Linux, Git, Docker, CI/CD, Networking, Shell Scripting
- AI Tools: Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode

## Projects

- Go Core: Multi-tenant auth module for Go — JWT, OAuth2, WebAuthn, 2FA, RBAC, HTMX admin GUI
- SimplySigned: Legal e-signature SaaS — PDF upload, signing links, audit trails, tamper detection
- Foodable: AI-driven food recommendation app with vector search and OpenAI
- Image Editor: Python/OpenCV desktop app for real-time image editing
